# The Nolana Report

Weekly business intelligence briefing for Rio Grande Valley entrepreneurs and business owners. Published every Monday.

## About

The Nolana Report is an AI-powered weekly business intelligence briefing covering the Rio Grande Valley (RGV) in South Texas. It delivers scored, summarized local business stories every Monday via email and web, serving entrepreneurs, small business owners, and decision-makers in McAllen, Edinburg, Pharr, Mission, and across Hidalgo County.

## Key Information

- Published by: National Bookkeeping Company® (nationalboco.com)
- Location: McAllen, Texas
- Frequency: Weekly (every Monday)
- Languages: English and Spanish
- Coverage area: Rio Grande Valley, Texas
- Subscription tiers: Free, Pro ($9/mo), Intel ($19/mo)

## Content

- Current Issue: https://nolanareport.com/issues
- Subscribe: https://nolanareport.com/
- Advertise: https://nolanareport.com/advertise
- Money Map: https://nolanareport.com/money-map
- Contact: info@nationalboco.com

## Topics Covered

- Local business openings, closings, and expansions
- Commercial real estate and development
- Government decisions affecting business
- Cross-border trade and commerce
- Workforce and employment trends
- Healthcare and education business impact
- Industrial investment and Foreign Trade Zone activity
- USD/MXN exchange rates and bridge wait times

## Data Sources

25+ sources including KRGV, ValleyCentral, RGV Business Journal, The Monitor, Brownsville Herald, Rio Grande Guardian, Texas Border Business, Valley Business Report, Federal Register, CBP, and local EDCs.

Every story is scored 0-10 for relevance to RGV business owners using the Nolana Relevance Index (NRI).
